text:
ByMichael J. MattRemnant TV——Bio and Archives--August 3, 2024

Videos|CFP Comments|Email Us

Move over Pagan Rome -- the International Olympic Committee’s (IOC) debauchery would make Caligula blush. In this episode of the Remnant Underground, Michael J. Matt questions why any serious Christian would bother with the Olympics anymore. If the IOC’s transgender torch bearers weren’t enough, then what about the fact that they’ve now made a sport out of men battering women?

Pope Francis may be silent in the face of this Chrysophobia outrage, but Cardinal Burke, Bishop Strickland, and the heir to the French throne are speaking out. You won’t believe what Louis de Bourbon said about the woke haters who are currently running his beloved France…into the ground.

Mover over Idiocracy – Kackling Kammy may well be your next president. Impossible? Yes, that’s what they said about Basement Biden the last time around. She can easily win – all she has to do is promise to kill more babies than the last jackass.

By the way, this isn’t politics – this is an evil religion. Michael discusses how even Donald Trump is out there warning the country that Kammy & Co. are coming after Catholics first.

And finally, the Latin Mass summits Mount Kilimanjaro as American and African clans get ready to reset the Catholic Church in the image and likeness of Tradition. Just back from his trip to Tanzania, Michael shares some great news out of Africa.

View Comments
